title: 10 Pack in S Shaped Hooks Hanging Hooks Hangers for Bathroom, Bedroom, Office, Kitchen Pot Pan Hanger Clothes Storage Rack Polished for Your Pots and Pans, Utensils, Towels, Ties(Grey & Small)

【Rust-Proof】Due to the use of stainless steel material, the S-shaped hook will not corrode and rust, and can maintain gloss for a long time
【Anti-scratch Design】The two ends of the S-shaped hook are designed with round balls, which can stably fix items on the shelf without scratching the surface of the items.
【Easy to Use】 Premium S-Hooks Garden Hanging Hooks are easy to hang on existing objects,not need tools,nails, screws, or adhesives. They are not limited to a specific area of your home

【Multipurpose S Hooks】These Heavy Duty S Hooks are widely applied in kitchen (as kitchen hooks), closet, bathroom, storage room, workshop, office, and garage. Use them in the kitchen for hanging utensils, utensils, or even coffee mugs.
